glosses.en: to serve; to be used for

sentences.target: Das Handy soll als Wecker dienen.

translations.de: Das Handy soll als Wecker dienen.
translations.en: The phone is supposed to serve as an alarm clock.
translations.vi: Điện thoại dùng làm đồng hồ báo thức.
translations.hi: फोन अलार्म की तरह काम करेगा.
translations.ja: スマホは目覚まし時計として使う。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject noun 'Handy'.
Common noun, neuter singular; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'dienen' to express intended function.
Preposition marking a role/function phrase linked to 'dienen' ('serve as').
Common noun, masculine singular; predicative/role NP after 'als'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; main verb governed by the modal 'soll'.

sentences.target: Das Foto soll mir als Erinnerung dienen.
sentences.reading: /das ˈfoːto zɔl miːɐ̯ als ɛˈʁɪnəʁʊŋ ˈdiːnən/

translations.de: Das Foto soll mir als Erinnerung dienen.
translations.ipa: /das ˈfoːto zɔl miːɐ̯ als ɛˈʁɪnəʁʊŋ ˈdiːnən/
translations.en: The photo is meant to be a reminder for me.
translations.es: La foto me sirve de recordatorio.
translations.fr: La photo me sert de rappel.
translations.it: La foto mi serve da promemoria.
translations.ko: 이 사진은 나에게 상기시켜 주는 역할을 해.
translations.pt: A foto serve como lembrete para mim.
translations.vi: Bức ảnh dùng để nhắc tôi.
translations.nl: De foto is een geheugensteuntje γia mij.
translations.hi: यह फोटो मुझे याद दिलाने के लिए है.
translations.el: Η φωτογραφία είναι υπενθύμιση για μένα.
translations.nb: Bildet er en påminnelse for meg.
translations.id: Foto ini jadi pengingat buat saya.
translations.sv: Fotot är en påminnelse för míg.
translations.cs: Fotografie mi má sloužit jako připomínka.
translations.da: Fotoet er en påmindelse for mig.
translations.ja: この写真は私に思い出させるためのものだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject noun 'Foto'.
Common noun, neuter singular; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; governs the bare infinitive 'dienen'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/beneficiary selected by 'dienen' (jemandem dienen).
Preposition marking a role/function phrase ('as a reminder') linked to 'dienen'.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicative/role NP after 'als'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; main verb governed by the modal 'soll'.

sentences.target: Die Regeln sollen der Sicherheit dienen.

translations.de: Die Regeln sollen der Sicherheit dienen.
translations.en: The rules are meant to serve safety.
translations.fr: Les règles sont là pour la sécurité.
translations.it: Le regole sono per la sicurezza.
translations.vi: Các quy định là vì an toàn.
translations.nl: De regels zijn er voor de veiligheid.
translations.el: Οι κανόνες είναι για την ασφάλεια.
translations.ja: ルールは安全のためにある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of the subject noun 'Regeln'.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person plural; governs the bare infinitive 'dienen'.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Sicherheit'.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; dative object/goal required by 'dienen' (etwas dient der Sicherheit).
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; main verb governed by the modal 'sollen'.

sentences.target: Diese Notizen können mir zum Lernen dienen.
sentences.reading: /ˈdiːzə noˈtiːtsən ˈkœnən miːɐ̯ tsʊm ˈlɛʁnən ˈdiːnən/

translations.de: Diese Notizen können mir zum Lernen dienen.
translations.ipa: /ˈdiːzə noˈtiːtsən ˈkœnən miːɐ̯ tsʊm ˈlɛʁnən ˈdiːnən/
translations.en: These notes can serve me for studying.
translations.es: Estas notas pueden ayudarme a estudiar.
translations.fr: Ces notes peuvent m'aider à étudier.
translations.it: Questi appunti possono aiutarmi a studiare.
translations.ko: 이 노트들은 공부하는 데 도움이 될 수 있어.
translations.yue: 呢啲筆記可以幫我讀書。
translations.ru: Эти заметки могут помочь мне учиться.
translations.pt: Essas anotações podem me ajudar a estudar.
translations.he: ההערות האלה יכולות לעזור לי ללמוד.
translations.tr: Bu notlar ders çalışmama yardımcı olabilir.
translations.vi: Những ghi chú này có thể giúp tôi học.
translations.ar: هذه الملاحظات يمكن أن تساعدني على الدراسة.
translations.nl: Deze aantekeningen kunnen me helpen met studeren.
translations.uk: Ці нотатки можуть допомогти мені в навчанні.
translations.hu: Ezek a jegyzetek segíthetnek nekem a tanulásban.
translations.hi: ये नोट्स पढ़ाई में मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं.
translations.pl: Te notatki mogą mi pomóc się uczyć.
translations.el: Αυτές οι σημειώσεις μπορούν να με βοηθήσουν να μελετήσω.
translations.nb: Disse notatene kan hjelpe meg å studere.
translations.id: Catatan ini bisa membantu saya belajar.
translations.sv: De här anteckningarna kan hjälpa mig att plugga.
translations.ro: Aceste notițe mă pot ajuta să învăț.
translations.cs: Tyto poznámky mi mohou pomoci studovat.
translations.da: Disse noter kan hjælpe mig med at læse.
translations.fi: Nämä muistiinpanot voivat auttaa minua opiskelemaan.
translations.ja: これらのメモは勉強に役立つ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, nominative plural; modifies the subject noun 'Notizen'.
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the subject NP.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person plural (ability/possibility); selects the bare infinitive 'dienen'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/beneficiary with 'dienen'.
Contraction of 'zu dem' (ADP + definite article, dative singular neuter); introduces a purpose PP ('zum Lernen').
Nominalized infinitive, neuter singular dative as complement of 'zu(m)'; denotes purpose.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; main verb governed by the modal 'können'.

Das Foto soll mir als Erinnerung dienen.
Die Regeln sollen der Sicherheit dienen.
Diese Notizen können mir zum Lernen dienen.

de: Das Handy soll als Wecker dienen.
Das Foto soll mir als Erinnerung dienen.

Diese Notizen können mir zum Lernen dienen.

en: The phone is supposed to serve as an alarm clock.
The photo is meant to be a reminder for me.
The rules are meant to serve safety.
These notes can serve me for studying.
